text: “Railroad” means a carrier of persons or property upon cars, other than streetcars, operated upon stationary rails.
markdown:
## Title 43
### Chapter 484A
##### § 484A.200 — “Railroad” defined.

“Railroad” means a carrier of persons or property upon cars, other than streetcars, operated upon stationary rails.

subsections.text: “Railroad” means a carrier of persons or property upon cars, other than streetcars, operated upon stationary rails.
